label: GFC_peak_fall

label: GFC_trough

label: dotcom_bear

label: covid_crash

label: bull_2017
weakest: Bull-lag (dim 1): verbatim boilerplate prefix ('Strategy trades bull-market upside...8.6% vs 16.8%') copied identically across all 10 notes; rubric caps at 4/6 for repeated boilerplate

label: bull_2021
weakest: Bull-lag (dim 1): verbatim boilerplate prefix repeated across all notes; rubric caps at 4/6 for copied boilerplate even when context suffix is relevant

label: bull_2013_qend
weakest: Bull-lag (dim 1): verbatim boilerplate prefix shared with all other notes; boilerplate penalty applies regardless of adequate context suffix

label: mild_dip_2018

label: qend_2019

label: near_high_2020
